YX_COVERT_SHIFT_POWER.title: Covert Shift
YX_COVERT_SHIFT_POWER.description: Reverse losing HP to healing HP.
YX_COVERT_SHIFT_POWER.smartDescription: Reverse losing HP to healing HP for the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.
YX_SPIRITUAL_DIVINATION_POWER.title: Spiritual Divination
YX_SPIRITUAL_DIVINATION_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you spend {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Hexagram[/gold] for each spent {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
YX_FURY_THUNDER_POWER.title: Fury Thunder
YX_FURY_THUNDER_POWER.description: Let your next [blue]Thunder Attack[/blue] card deal additional damage.
YX_FURY_THUNDER_POWER.smartDescription: Let your next [blue]Thunder Attack[/blue] card deal additional [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] damage.
YX_HEPTASTAR_SOULSTAT_POWER.title: Heptastar Soulstat
YX_HEXAGRAM_POWER.title: Hexagram
YX_HEXAGRAM_POWER.description: Make next random effect to get the best result (The random range takes the maximum value, and the random probablity becomes 100%).
YX_HEXAGRAM_POWER.smartDescription: Make next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:effect|effects} to get the best result (The random range takes the maximum value, and the random probablity becomes 100%).
YX_HEXAGRAM_FORMACIDE_POWER.title: Hexagram Formacide
YX_HEXAGRAM_FORMACIDE_POWER.description: Deal damage to ALL enemies when you gain [gold]Hexagram[/gold].
YX_HEXAGRAM_FORMACIDE_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you gain [gold]Hexagram[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]Hexagram[/gold].
YX_HUNTER_HUNTING_HUNTER_POWER.title: Hunter Hunting Hunter
YX_HUNTER_HUNTING_HUNTER_POWER.descripti: Whenever you play a [gold]Post Action[/gold] card, deal damage.
YX_HUNTER_HUNTING_HUNTER_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you play a [gold]Post Action[/gold] card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
YX_JADE_SCROLL_OF_YIN_SYMBOL_POWER.title: Jade Scroll Of Yin Symbol
YX_JADE_SCROLL_OF_YIN_SYMBOL_POWER.descr:
Increase damage to enemies with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] by percentage.
Decrease damage from enemies with [gold]Weak[/gold] by percentage.
YX_JADE_SCROLL_OF_YIN_SYMBOL_POWER.smart:
Increase damage to enemies with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}%[/blue].
Decrease damage from enemies with [gold]Weak[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}%[/blue].
YX_POLARIS_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.title: Polaris Citta Dharma
YX_POLARIS_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.descriptio: All slots in your hand are [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_PREEMPTIVE_STRIKE_POWER.title: Preemptive Strike
YX_STAR_MOON_FOLDING_FAN_POWER.title: Star Moon Folding Fan
YX_STAR_MOON_FOLDING_FAN_POWER.descripti: Reduces {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} costs for cards on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_STAR_MOON_FOLDING_FAN_POWER.smartDesc: Reduces {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} costs by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue] for cards on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_STAR_POINT_POWER.title: Star Point
YX_STAR_POINT_POWER.description:
The third and sixth slots of your hand cards are the default [gold]Star Point[/gold].
The card on [gold]Star Point[/gold] can trigger its [gold]Star Point[/gold] effects if applicable.
YX_STAR_POWER_POWER.title: Star Power
YX_STAR_POWER_POWER.description: Adds additional damage to attacks on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_STAR_POWER_POWER.smartDescription: {Amount:cond:<0?Decreases|Increases} attack damage by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue] for cards on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_STILLNESS_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.title: Stillness Citta Dharma
YX_STILLNESS_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you spend {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Temporary HP[/gold] for each spent {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
YX_TEMPORARY_HP_POWER.title: Temporary HP
YX_TEMPORARY_HP_POWER.description:
Increase [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] in the battle.
After the battle, lose [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] (retain at least 1).
YX_TEMPORARY_HP_POWER.smartDescription:
Increase [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] in the battle.
After the battle, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] (retain at least 1).
YX_THROW_PETRALS_POWER.title: Throw Petrals
YX_THUNDER_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.title: Thunder Citta Dharma
YX_ULTIMATE_HEXAGRAM_BASE_POWER.title: Ultimate Hexagram Base
YX_ULTIMATE_HEXAGRAM_BASE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Hexagram[/gold].
YX_ULTIMATE_HEXAGRAM_BASE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Hexagram[/gold].
